note: Deterministic mutation instructions for the EP platform-attestation consumer profile. The runner creates ephemeral Ed25519 fixture keys and compact JWTs; this public file intentionally contains no keys, private material, signatures, or tokens.

vectors.title: PLATFORM ATTESTATION: accepts the exact RP-pinned result
PLATFORM ATTESTATION: rejects attester key substitution
PLATFORM ATTESTATION: rejects a different EAT nonce
PLATFORM ATTESTATION: rejects a different action digest
PLATFORM ATTESTATION: rejects an unpinned build measurement
PLATFORM ATTESTATION: rejects an expired result
PLATFORM ATTESTATION: rejects a future-issued result
PLATFORM ATTESTATION: rejects a result older than RP policy
PLATFORM ATTESTATION: ignores a custom override for the reserved AEC type
